chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Today we will see again how much is there in it

chunks.text: And after that you have to solve it. Let's go to the computer screen

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: And let's get started

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: So news API is a very amazing thing

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: One thing is for sure

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: But the work I want to do from you today

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Let me show you

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: What to do is to use the news API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: First of all, search for news API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: If you don't know what news API is

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Then don't be ashamed

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Because news API may not be known to some people

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: But yes, if you say that you don't know news API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Then you must be ashamed

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Search for news with code

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I am doing a sponsor

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: This is a good API and you can use its free version

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: And you will get to learn the use of request module

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You can get all the news by hitting get request on request module

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You can show it on command line

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I don't want to give too much hint

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Otherwise everyone will have fun

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: So what you have to do

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Use the news API and the request module

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I will tell you what happens in this

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I will tell you when I come to the documentation of news API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You have to do different news of weather, sports, celebrities

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: News of youtubers

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: All kinds of news

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You can fetch here

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes what happens is that our daily newspaper

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I was reading the newspaper yesterday

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: That the dog of Mr. Saxena bit him

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: His wife made dal

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I don't give 7 rupees for this

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: There is a newspaper of 7 rupees

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I give it to read

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: So sometimes I have to come here and use such apps

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: If you sit on TV, then there are such news headlines

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: That there was a fight in the coconut in the mobile

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: What do aliens drink, where is the cow's milk going

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: What is happening, the milk has disappeared from somewhere

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: If you have your news API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Then you will see the same news that you should see

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Now the documentation of news API is very good

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I will show you its documentation

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You can filter the sources

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: That I only need news of TOI

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You can filter like this

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Which is a very good thing

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You can search for news with keywords

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I will not make you feel bad

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You just have to take this URL

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: And my API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I am getting angry

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Last time I made a project of this

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Everyone exhausted my API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Why are you making fun of my API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Making your own API is free

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Either it is 10 rupees or 5 rupees

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You will have to win a lot of wars to make an API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Then you will get an API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Make your own API and sign up for newsapi.org

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Use my API

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I don't forget the day

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: And my API is not wasted

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: So I will meet you in the solution of exercise 10

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I want to say one thing before leaving

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Show me your creativity

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Show me weather news

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: What type of news do you want to watch

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Press 1 for weather, press 2 for sports

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: But everyone should do a basic news

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: You can give some options

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Press 1 for TOI news

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Press 1 for sports news

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Press 2 for Bollywood news

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: Don't make it so difficult

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: So that you don't see news

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: So that's it for now

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: I will meet you in the solution of exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 10： News App in Python
chunks.text: And i will see you next time
